opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head is pounding so hard it makes me sick, the light burns my eyes, and my neck is completely locked up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe headache with fever, light sensitivity, and neck stiffness.

symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying still in a dark room
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: high fever, severe light sensitivity (keeping eyes shut, room darkened), cannot touch chin to chest due to pain/stiffness, vomited twice, roommate says she has become sluggish and confused over the last 2 hours
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no previous episodes like this, generally healthy
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: lying in bed in a dark room, groaning in pain, deeply distressed

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: roommate present and very concerned, university student living in shared accommodation

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: in severe pain, roommate frightened by the confusion

access_barriers.transport: roommate present but patient too unwell to safely mobilise
